name: POST /api/v1/account/user/ - success with valid verification_token
description:
Purpose: Verify that a valid verification_token returns user info and tokens.
        Step 1: Get verification_token from /api/v1/auth/verification/
        Step 2: POST verification_token to /api/v1/account/user/
descriptionHtml:
Purpose: Verify that a valid verification_token returns user info and tokens.

    Step 2: POST verification_token to /api/v1/account/user/
